action.name: Compress for Web
action.description: Compress and resize images for Web distribution

action.name: Archive torrent files
action.description: Move uploaded torrent files to archive directory

action.name: SCP to dl:
action.description: SCP this file to aelita:/srv/dl/

action.name: Compress PDF
action.description: Compress and downscale PDF file using ghostscript

action.name: Compress PDF (aggressive)
action.description: Compress and downscale PDF file using ghostscript, higher compression

action.name: Compress PDF (light)
action.description: Compress and downscale PDF file using ghostscript (screen setting)

action.name: Merge PDFs
action.description: Concatenate PDF files onto a single one

action.name: Split PDF
action.description: Split PDF file into one file for each of its pages

action.name: Show EXIF datetime
action.description: Print the image EXIF DateTime value

action.name: Set GPS location from file
action.description: Change file(s) GPS location data to those of the selected file

action.name: Set GPS location from file with GPS datetime
action.description: Change file(s) GPS location data to those of the selected file, including the GPSDateStamp and GPSTimeStamp

action.name: Check torrent consistency
action.description: Check a directory for compliance with Redacted upload rules and run other media sanity checks

action.name: Annotate photo border
action.description: Add a white border around the photo, with EXIF metadata at the bottom

action.name: Squarify image
action.description: Add white padding to make the image square

action.name: Squarify image + pad
action.description: Add white padding to make the image square, with some more padding to avoid the image touching two borders

action.name: Create torrent
action.description: Create RED & OPS torrent from this directory and upload it to aelita for seeding

action.name: From Qobuz
action.description: Ensure MD5, set tags, generate spectrograms, and check torrent consistency

action.name: Cleanup
action.description: Remove extraneous FLAC metadata tags

action.name: Cleanup & set from folder
action.description: Remove extraneous tags and set Title, Artist and Album from folder name

action.name: Fetch & set cover art
action.description: Find album cover art from folder name and prompt for confirmation before applying it to all FLAC files in the directory

action.name: Rename from tags
action.description: Rename FLAC files from their metadata tags following standard format

action.name: Ensure MD5 in STREAMINFO
action.description: Ensure all FLAC files have a non-zero MD5 in the STREAMINFO block, re-encode them using flac if needed, and remove padding in their metadata

action.name: Remove FLAC padding
action.description: Remove all PADDING blocks from the FLAC files metadata using metaflac

action.name: Downsample FLAC to 16 bits
action.description: Transcode all files in the directory to FLAC 16 bits with downsampler-threaded

action.name: Transcode to MP3 320
action.description: Transcode all files in the directory to MP3 320 CBR

action.name: Transcode to MP3 V0
action.description: Transcode all files in the directory to MP3 V0

action.name: Spectrogram
action.description: Generate spectrograms for media files with sox and open them

action.name: Zip to dl:
action.description: Zip directory and scp it to aelita:/srv/dl/

action.name: Zip to dl:photos
action.description: Zip directory and scp it to aelita:/srv/dl/photos/

action.name: Open terminal here
action.description: Open default terminal in the current directory

action.name: Show FLAC info
action.description: Print FLAC bit depth and sample rate

action.name: PTPimg
action.description: Compress the image, upload it to ptpimg.me, and copy the resulting URL

action.name: Photoshare
action.description: Zip and upload to local photoshare
